groupDefinition.name: Console & Status Bar
groupDefinition.description: Unified interface for input/output streaming and real-time operational status display.

items.title: Debug Console Functionality
details: Receive DAP `output` events, route by category to Debugger Console / Program Console
Add command input field, send `evaluate` request
Auto-scroll to latest log
Log timestamp display

items.title: Connection Status Indicator Functionality
items.description: Make status bar dynamic per spec [§3.2.5](system-specification.md#325-status-bar--console)
details: Bind `DapTransportService` connection status Observable
Green light = connected, gray light = disconnected, red light = connection error
Display connection address information
Display current debug state (Running / Stopped / Terminated)

items.title: Command Serialization: Evaluate Cancel & Timeout
items.description: Implement cancelRequest() and evaluate() on DapSessionService plus Cancel button UI in LogViewerComponent per command-serialization.md R-CS2
details: Gate evaluate on capabilities.supportsCancelRequest — disable input permanently if false
Add public cancelRequest(requestId: number): Promise<void> to DapSessionService
Add public evaluate(expression, frameId?): Promise<DapResponse> with 30 s Promise.race timeout — rejects with EvaluateCancelledError
Add EvaluateCancelledError class
In LogViewerComponent: add evaluateInFlight$ BehaviorSubject and pendingEvaluateSeq storage
Swap submit button to Cancel button while in-flight; set input readonly
Optimistically reset UI on cancel click before awaiting DAP cancel response
Show snackbar on auto-timeout
[Test] capability gate disables field; cancel resolves; timeout fires at 30 s

items.title: Library Extraction: LogViewerComponent
items.description: Extract LogViewerComponent into a dedicated library @taro/ui-console and modularize it into separate sub-components for better maintainability.
details: Create projects/ui-console library
Split LogViewerComponent into DebugConsole (evaluation), OutputConsole (program), and LogViewer (orchestrator)
Relocate virtual scroll logic and styles to the library
Update DebuggerComponent imports
[Test] Verify both tabs function correctly and auto-scroll behaves as expected
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/log-viewer-library-extraction.md

items.title: DAP Protocol Inspector (3-Tab Support)
items.description: Add a third tab to the console for raw DAP protocol traffic (requests, responses, and events) to isolate diagnostic data from user program output.
details: Add ProtocolConsole sub-component to @taro/ui-console
Modify LogViewerComponent to include 3rd tab with category 'dap' filter
Update DebuggerComponent traffic subscription to feed the new stream
Add JSON expansion support for protocol payloads
[Fix] Refactor CDK Virtual Scroll to support variable heights via AutoSizeVirtualScrollStrategy or a custom handler
[Test] Verify DAP traffic appears in the 3rd tab and the main Debug Console remains clean
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/log-viewer-library-extraction.md

items.title: Debug Console Input Integration & Output Redirection
items.description: Integrate evaluate input and results into the Debug Console stream.
details: Remove console-input-area bar styling
Implement integrated terminal-style input line
Log evaluate results to consoleLogs$
Remove evaluation snackBar toasts
[Test] Verify evaluation input triggers DAP request and results appear in Debug Console stream
